basics.name: Declan Chan
basics.label: LinkedIn · GitHub

highlights: Dean’s Honours List (all semesters)
IB Score: 45/45
OSSD Top 6: 99.67%
Director's Achievement Award

work.name: Autonomous Discovery of Alloys
highlights: Designed experiments to evaluate the robustness of machine learning force fields.
Benchmarked MLFF predictions against density functional theory calculations.
Performed large-scale experiments on Canada's Fir HPC cluster.

work.name: University of Toronto Aerospace Team
highlights: Developed software for CubeSat attitude determination and control systems.
Developed Python modules for attitude dynamics and flight simulation.
Simulated magnetic environments using a Helmholtz cage and MATLAB.

work.name: Robotics for Space Exploration
highlights: Designed robotic arm components using CAD for 3D modelling.
Performed finite element analysis in SolidWorks Simulation to evaluate designs.

work.name: Northern Karate Schools
highlights: Yondan: Certified 4th Degree Black Belt.
Gold medal at the Toronto International Tournament of Martial Arts Champions.
Teach 100+ students each week through group and private lessons.

projects.name: Attacks Against Machine Learning Force Fields
highlights: Developed open-source software to generate first-order adversarial attacks against MLFFs.
Built Python/PyTorch pipelines to process Materials Project and LiCOHPF datasets.
Automated ASE relaxation, perturbation, and contour exploration workflows using Bash and Slurm.

projects.name: GenAI Genesis Hackathon
highlights: Developed an interactive platform visualizing human disease progression.
Implemented a RAG system trained on PubMed data via IBM watsonx.ai.
Built an AI-powered 3D web application with React and three.js.

projects.name: CIV102 Bridge Project
highlights: Optimized structural performance and prototyped a matboard bridge using Python.
Top 1 in the cohort and 2nd in the class of 2025.

projects.name: Astrophysics Research Project
highlights: Conducted data analysis and literature review on Yarkovsky effect orbital perturbations.
Modelled thermal-radiation orbital drift and trajectories of several near-Earth asteroids.

projects.name: NFT Generation
highlights: Used the HashLips Art Engine to generate layered NFT artwork from image assets.
Created and deployed NFTs on OpenSea.io using the Polygon Ethereum blockchain.
